title: John Watson
compiled_truth: John Watson is an external contact at [Pdq](companies/pdq). Over the corpus period (2000-11-28 to 2002-03-25), John Watson sent 64 and received 33 emails, totalling 97 interactions. Top correspondents: [Kimberly Watson](people/kimberly-watson) (50), [Kwatson](people/kwatson) (3), [Hthurlow](people/hthurlow-aol) (2), [Smith](people/smith-bcm) (2), [Samhill39](people/samhill39-msn) (2).
